---
title: " "
---

<div class="profile-container">
<div class="profile-photo">
<img src="images/headshot.jpg" alt="Revathy Surya Narayana">
</div>
<div class="profile-info">

# Revathy Surya Narayana

<div class="title">
Assistant Professor | O'Donnell School of Public Health | UT Southwestern Medical Center<br>
Research Associate | CHERISH (Center for Health Economics of Treatment Interventions for Substance Use Disorder, HCV, and HIV)
</div>

<div class="bio">
I am an Assistant Professor in Health Economics, Systems, and Policy at the O'Donnell School of Public Health, UT Southwestern Medical Center. I received my Ph.D. in Public Policy from the Jeb E. Brooks School of Public Policy at Cornell University.

My research focuses on health economics, labor economics, and public policy analysis. My published work appears in journals including the *Southern Economic Journal*, *Economics Letters*, *Health Economics*, *Applied Economics*, *Economics & Human Biology*, and *Economic Development and Cultural Change*. My current projects examine topics ranging from tobacco regulation and substance use policy to the effects of income support programs on health and criminal behavior.
</div>

<div class="contact-info">
**Email:** [revathy.suryanarayana@utsouthwestern.edu](mailto:revathy.suryanarayana@utsouthwestern.edu)<br>
**Address:** E2.430, 5323 Harry Hines Blvd, Dallas, TX 75390
</div>

</div>
</div>
